titles.title: Recognizing and honoring National Mushroom Day and the contributions of Chester and Berks Counties to the national mushroom industry and to healthy diets.
Recognizing and honoring National Mushroom Day and the contributions of Chester and Berks Counties to the national mushroom industry and to healthy diets.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Agriculture.

bill.summary: This resolution supports the recognition of National Mushroom Day and honors Pennsylvania for its contributions to the national mushroom industry.
